content.content:
# Unified Content References

Unified Content References (UCR) allow you to reference and embed content from anywhere in your MeshWeaver application using a simple @ notation in markdown.

## Syntax Overview

| Syntax | Behavior | Example |
|--------|----------|--------|
| `@path` | Hyperlink with tooltip | `@app/Northwind/Dashboard` |
| `@@path` | Inline embedded content | `@@app/Northwind/Dashboard` |

## Hyperlinks with @ (Single At)

Single @ creates a hyperlink to the referenced content:

```markdown
See the @app/Northwind/Dashboard for business metrics.
```

This renders as a styled hyperlink with:
- Tooltip showing the reference details
- Collection of all references in a "References" section at the end

## Inline Content with @@ (Double At)

Double @@ embeds the content directly inline:

```markdown
@@app/Northwind/Dashboard
```

This renders the referenced content directly in place.

## Path Format

References use the format: `addressType/addressId[/keyword[/path]]`

### Address Types
- `app` - Application addresses
- `pricing` - Pricing system addresses
- Custom registered address types

### Keywords (Optional)

Keywords determine how the path is interpreted:

| Keyword | Description | Example |
|---------|-------------|--------|
| `data:` | Data collection/entity | `@app/Northwind/data/Order` |
| `content:` | File content | `@app/Northwind/content/Docs/report.pdf` |
| `area:` | Layout area (default) | `@app/Northwind/area/Dashboard` |
| `collection:` | Collection definition | `@app/Northwind/collection/Orders` |
| `schema:` | JSON schema | `@app/Northwind/schema/Order` |

If no keyword is specified, `area:` is assumed.

## Data References

### Collection Reference
Reference all entities in a collection:
```markdown
@app/Northwind/data/Order
```

### Entity Reference
Reference a specific entity by ID:
```markdown
@app/Northwind/data/Order/10248
```

## Content References

Reference files from content collections:

### Markdown Files
```markdown
@@app/Northwind/content/Docs/overview.md
```
Renders the markdown content inline.

### Images
```markdown
@@app/Northwind/content/Images/logo.png
```
Displays the image inline.

### PDF Files
```markdown
@@app/Northwind/content/Reports/annual-report.pdf
```
Embeds in an iframe with download fallback.

### Excel/CSV Files
```markdown
@@app/Northwind/content/Data/sales.xlsx
```
Shows a table preview of the first rows.

### Other Files
```markdown
@@app/Northwind/content/Files/archive.zip
```
Shows a download link.

## Layout Area References

Reference layout areas (views, dashboards, reports):

```markdown
@app/Northwind/Dashboard
@app/Northwind/OrderSummary
@app/Northwind/SalesByCategory
```

### With Area ID
Some areas accept an ID parameter:
```markdown
@app/Northwind/OrderDetails/10248
```

### With Query Parameters
Pass parameters using `?`:
```markdown
@app/Northwind/SalesByCategory?Year=2025
```

## Quoted Syntax

For paths with spaces, use quotes:
```markdown
@"app/Northwind/content/Reports/Annual Report 2025.pdf"
```

## Parentheses Syntax (Legacy)

The older parentheses syntax is still supported:
```markdown
@("app/Northwind/Dashboard")
@(app/Northwind/data/Order)
```

## Autocomplete

When typing @ in the markdown editor:

1. **After @** - Shows addresses from current namespace
2. **After address** - Shows keywords (data:, area:, content:, etc.)
3. **After keyword** - Shows specific items (collections, areas, files)

The autocomplete is context-aware and prioritizes items from your current navigation location.

## References Section

All single @ references in a document are collected and displayed in a "References" section at the end, similar to academic citations. This provides:
- Quick navigation to referenced content
- Overview of all external dependencies
- Path information for each reference

## Examples

### Dashboard Overview
```markdown
# Northwind Overview

See the @app/Northwind/Dashboard for key metrics.

## Detailed Reports

@@app/Northwind/SalesByCategory

For more details, check @app/Northwind/OrderSummary.
```

### Data Display
```markdown
## Customer Orders

@@app/Northwind/data/Order

### Single Order Details

@@app/Northwind/data/Order/10248
```

### Mixed Content
```markdown
## Documentation

Please review the @app/Docs/content/Guidelines/coding-standards.md.

### Embedded Image

@@app/Assets/content/Images/architecture.png

### Download Template

Get the template: @app/Templates/content/Files/project-template.xlsx
```
